name: Baked Pizza Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cheese (Use 8-oz package of sliced American or mozzarella cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Cook and stir the meat in a large skillet until browned. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in half of the tomato sauce and oregano leaves into the meat mixture.
4. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
5. Mix baking mix, egg, and milk. Set aside 3/4 cup of batter.
6. Spread remaining batter in a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Pour tomato sauce over the batter, spreading evenly.
8. Layer cheese, meat mixture, mushrooms, and remaining cheese on top.
9. Spoon reserved batter on top of the cheese.
10. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese on top.
11. Bake, uncovered, until golden brown (20-25 minutes).
12. Cool for 5 minutes before cutting into squares and serving.
